subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Hearken thou unto My Voice: Verily there is none other God but Me, the Almighty, the All-Wise.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ورقتی ان استمعی ندائی انه لا اله الا انا العزیز الحکیم اجد منک نفحات حبی و
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @call to action, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
